out_of_scope_non_business_analysis.description: Task falls outside BA scope: code implementation, UI design, test authoring, architecture, verification, agent engineering
out_of_scope_non_business_analysis.check: execution_log contains no BA-relevant tool calls (decompose, map_jbt, articulate_requirements, frame_fit_criteria, surface_non_goals) AND query contains implementation, design, test, or verification request

no_identified_stakeholder.description: No identified stakeholder who can validate need decomposition or authorize scope
no_identified_stakeholder.check: query identifies no decision_maker AND no primary_actor AND no stakeholder_group

vertical_slice_boundary_undefined.description: No clear vertical slice boundary defined for the requirement
vertical_slice_boundary_undefined.check: query contains no explicit in_scope AND no explicit out_of_scope AND no explicit boundary_marker

returns_rejection_statement.description: Agent returns explicit Rejection statement at top of response with specific reason
returns_rejection_statement.check: execution_log contains response_with_rejection_header == true AND reason_text matching one of the trigger_conditions keys

identifies_correct_arc.description: If task belongs to different archetype, agent identifies the correct archetype and states acceptance criteria
identifies_correct_arc.check: execution_log contains suggested_archetype field with non-null value WHEN out_of_scope_non_business_analysis == true AND acceptance_criteria_text with minimum_length > 20 characters

confirms_no_modification.description: Agent explicitly confirms no code, files, or workspace artifacts were modified and returned without beginning any BA decomposition work
confirms_no_modification.check: execution_log contains no_tool_calls_with_file_mutations == true AND no requirement_artifact_output AND no decomposed_needs_output

no_implementation_start.description: Agent does not begin any implementation, design, or testing work
no_implementation_start.check: execution_log contains no write_tool_calls AND no edit_tool_calls

no_ambiguous_absorption.description: Agent does not silently absorb task without rejection when trigger conditions are met
no_ambiguous_absorption.check: rejection_returned == true when any trigger_condition is true

no_scope_expansion.description: Agent does not expand scope beyond what was explicitly accepted
no_scope_expansion.check: execution_log contains no artifact_generation outside stated_requirement_scope
